Prompt
U
Oracle Events
1. Search emails for Elena's original forwarding request using search_emails (query: "forwarding" or "Zara" or "Omar" or "customer engagement lead"). Find Elena Rostova's email (email_id: 4c54370d3e714f3f84d9ac56a9432682) from elena.rostova@moveops.com to priya.chakrabarti@moveops.com, subject "Urgent: Customer Email Forwarding Setup Required." Elena asked for all customer emails sent to Zara Kovačević and Omar Ibrahim to be automatically redirected to the customer engagement lead. Elena's email states that both are off sick and the support team is overwhelmed.
2. Search emails for customer messages sent to Zara and Omar using search_emails (query: "zara.kovacevic" or "omar.ibrahim" or related terms). Find two unanswered customer emails: (1) email_id: 73d40b24b1324453b8fd5dcdfb7ad6c8, from sam@pivotpointlabs.com to zara.kovacevic@moveops.com, subject "Concerns About Negotiation Progress" — Sam Delgado expressing dissatisfaction with negotiation direction and requesting a call; (2) email_id: a2fe087ee46c4dbd9629e3da9430bae9, from tamara.byrd@mosaicrobotics.com to omar.ibrahim@moveops.com, subject "Urgent: Need to Schedule a Call" — Tamara Byrd urgently requesting to schedule a call. Neither email has a direct response from Zara or Omar.
3. Search emails for evidence of the forwarding implementation using search_emails (query: "Fwd:" or "forwarded" or "julian.brooks"). Find two forwarded copies: (1) email_id: 31a15aa2e0ed48f08fe58cd9f7802db5, from zara.kovacevic@moveops.com to julian.brooks@moveops.com, subject "Fwd: Concerns About Negotiation Progress" (parent_id: 73d40b24b1324453b8fd5dcdfb7ad6c8); (2) email_id: c494f9fb287b409d83e0f1ea52d949e9, from omar.ibrahim@moveops.com to julian.brooks@moveops.com, subject "Fwd: Urgent: Need to Schedule a Call" (parent_id: a2fe087ee46c4dbd9629e3da9430bae9). Discover that emails were forwarded to Julian Brooks (julian.brooks@moveops.com, Lead Customer Support Specialist) — NOT to David Chen (david.chen@moveops.com, Customer Engagement Lead). This is the core routing error.
4. Search Linear for the forwarding setup ticket using linear_list_issues, then read the issue and comments using linear_get_issue and linear_list_comments. Find ENG-484, marked Done, and confirm that the implemented behavior was to redirect customer emails for Zara Kovačević and Omar Ibrahim to the customer support lead, not the customer engagement lead.
5. Read comments on the issue using linear_list_comments (issueId: issue_044127e6d16d410f818ed9cd7dd0cf42). Find comment_c16e38e3c2414ea8b21cc5ee38e042dd stating: "The requested functionality has been implemented. Email forwarding for Zara Kovačević and Omar Ibrahim has been successfully set up to automatically redirect all incoming customer emails to the customer support lead. The comment says "customer support lead." Elena's original request said "customer engagement lead." Confirms that forwarding was incorrectly set up to the customer support lead.
6. Look up contacts to confirm who the "customer engagement lead" is using contacts_search_contacts (query: "David Chen") or contacts_get_contacts. Find David Chen, david.chen@moveops.com, Customer Engagement Lead. Also, look up Julian Brooks using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Julian Brooks"). Find Julian Brooks, julian.brooks@moveops.com, Lead Customer Support Specialist. Confirms these are two different roles — the forwarding went to the wrong person.
7. Search CRM for PivotPoint Labs deals using crm_search_companies (name: "PivotPoint") to find company_id: company_pivot, then crm_search_deals (company_id: "company_pivot"). Find deal_pivot_april_2026_dual — "PivotPoint Labs — April 2026 Dual Relocation (Okonjo + Castañeda)", dealstage: "in progress", amount: $10,650. Sam Delgado (CEO of PivotPoint Labs, sam@pivotpointlabs.com) sent the unanswered email to Zara — this in-progress deal is affected.
8. Search CRM for Mosaic Robotics deals using crm_search_companies (name: "Mosaic") to find company_id: company_mosaic, then crm_search_deals (company_id: "company_mosaic"). Find multiple in-progress deals: deal_mosaic_okoye_apr2026 (Zara Okoye Relocation, "in progress", $2,700), deal_mosaic_hartley_apr2026 (Deshawn Hartley Relocation, "in progress", $1,520), deal_mosaic_tanaka_apr2026 (Keiko Tanaka Relocation, "in progress", $2,770). Tamara Byrd (HR Manager at Mosaic Robotics, tamara.byrd@mosaicrobotics.com) sent the unanswered email to Omar — these in-progress deals are affected.
9. Forward Sam Delgado's unanswered email to the customer engagement lead using forward_email (email_id: 73d40b24b1324453b8fd5dcdfb7ad6c8, sender: elena.rostova@moveops.com or zara.kovacevic@moveops.com, recipients: ["david.chen@moveops.com"]). Include context that this email from PivotPoint Labs went unanswered due to the forwarding misconfiguration.
10. Forward Tamara Byrd's unanswered email to the customer engagement lead using forward_email (email_id: a2fe087ee46c4dbd9629e3da9430bae9, sender: elena.rostova@moveops.com or omar.ibrahim@moveops.com, recipients: ["david.chen@moveops.com"]). Include context that this email from Mosaic Robotics went unanswered due to the forwarding misconfiguration.
11. Flag PivotPoint Labs in-progress deal as at risk in CRM using crm_update_deal_stage (id: "deal_pivot_april_2026_dual", dealstage: "at_risk"). The deal is at risk because Sam Delgado's email expressing concerns about negotiation progress went unanswered due to the email routing misconfiguration.
12. Flag Mosaic Robotics in-progress deal(s) as at risk in CRM using crm_update_deal_stage (id: "deal_mosaic_okoye_apr2026" and/or "deal_mosaic_hartley_apr2026" and/or "deal_mosaic_tanaka_apr2026", dealstage: "at_risk"). The deals are at risk because Tamara Byrd's urgent email went unanswered due to the email routing misconfiguration.
13. Log the reason for the at-risk flag to CRM for PivotPoint Labs using crm_create_engagement (engagement_type: "NOTE", body: documenting that Sam Delgado's email "Concerns About Negotiation Progress" (email_id: 73d40b24b1324453b8fd5dcdfb7ad6c8) went unanswered because email forwarding was routed to julian.brooks@moveops.com (customer support lead) instead of david.chen@moveops.com (customer engagement lead), company_ids: ["company_pivot"]).
14. Log the reason for the at-risk flag to CRM for Mosaic Robotics using crm_create_engagement (engagement_type: "NOTE", body: documenting that Tamara Byrd's email "Urgent: Need to Schedule a Call" (email_id: a2fe087ee46c4dbd9629e3da9430bae9) went unanswered because email forwarding was routed to julian.brooks@moveops.com instead of david.chen@moveops.com, company_ids: ["company_mosaic"]).
15. Create a new Linear ticket for the routing problem using linear_create_issue (team: "team_engineering", title: "Email routing misconfiguration — forwarding to wrong recipient" or similar, description: forwarding was configured to route customer emails for Zara Kovačević and Omar Ibrahim to the customer support lead (julian.brooks@moveops.com) instead of the customer engagement lead (david.chen@moveops.com) as originally requested by Elena Rostova; references original issue issue_044127e6d16d410f818ed9cd7dd0cf42 (ENG-484) which was closed prematurely, priority: 1 or 2). The existing ENG-484 is marked Done. A new ticket is needed to track the fix for the incorrect routing target.
16. Notify relevant people about the routing problem and its impact using send_email or conversations_add_message. Key people who need to be notified include: (1) David Chen (david.chen@moveops.com) the correct engagement lead, needs to know about the unanswered customer emails now forwarded to him; (2) Priya Chakrabarti (priya.chakrabarti@moveops.com) original recipient of Elena's forwarding setup request; (3) Julian Brooks (julian.brooks@moveops.com) received the mis-routed forwarded emails; and/or (4) Samira Tariq (samira.tariq@moveops.com) engineering, if the routing fix requires technical work. Notification should cover: the forwarding misconfiguration, the two affected customer emails (PivotPoint and Mosaic), and the corrective actions taken.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
